title: architect: research Node/CLI best practices and author the extended code standard
description: architect produces a durable research artifact in .excn/research/ on Node + CLI best practices, then extends CODE_STANDARDS.md from it so 'clean' is a researched, enforceable rubric the code-standards gate applies. Includes the chartered-vs-emergent wording fix to CODE_STANDARDS.md's change-path line (currently 'raised only through the Retro Loop'), since architect-authored standards are chartered (ADR-0004) — mirroring sprint 2's Retro-Loop-docs refinement. Alignment-gated persistent-doc change, Team-Lead-approved.
acceptance_criteria: a durable Node/CLI best-practices research artifact exists in .excn/research/
CODE_STANDARDS.md extended from that research with checkable pass/fail rules, no prose padding (Precise Minimalism)
CODE_STANDARDS.md's change-path line carries the chartered-vs-emergent distinction (ADR-0004)
the change passes alignment and is Team-Lead-approved
